name: Business Analytics & Executive Intelligence
description: Business-aligned analytics for non-technical stakeholders — customer experience, revenue & sales, marketing ROI, HR & people, supply chain, finance, customer support, executive KPIs, and ESG sustainability reporting.
quickTip: Use DB Connect to ingest CRM, ERP, and HRIS data alongside web logs and app telemetry for unified business intelligence in Splunk.

quickStart.title: Sales Pipeline Velocity and Forecast Accuracy
Customer Churn Prediction and Early Warning
Carbon Footprint Tracking and Reduction Progress

subcategories.name: Customer Experience & Digital Analytics
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Apache Web Server (Splunkbase 3186), Splunk Add-on for Nginx (Splunkbase 3258), Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686), Splunk Add-on for Google Analytics (HEC), Splunk Stream (Splunkbase 1809), Splunk ITSI (Splunkbase 1841).
subcategories.dataSources: Web access logs (`sourcetype="access_combined"`, `sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie"`), application event logs (HEC), CDN logs (Cloudflare, Akamai, Fastly), CRM records via DB Connect (`dbx:salesforce`, `dbx:hubspot`), POS transaction logs, mobile app analytics (HEC), customer feedback/NPS data (HEC/CSV lookup).

subcategories.name: Revenue & Sales Operations
subcategories.dataSources: CRM records via DB Connect (Salesforce opportunities, HubSpot deals), ERP order data (`dbx:sap`, `dbx:oracle`), billing system events, subscription management platform data, POS transaction logs.

subcategories.name: Marketing Performance & Attribution
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Apache Web Server (Splunkbase 3186), Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686), HEC (marketing platform data).
subcategories.dataSources: Web access logs (UTM parameters), email marketing platform events (HEC), CRM lead/opportunity records (DB Connect), ad platform spend data (CSV/HEC), marketing automation logs.

subcategories.name: HR & People Analytics
subcategories.dataSources: HRIS records via DB Connect (Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, BambooHR — employee records, position data, compensation), time & attendance system logs, learning management system (LMS) data, applicant tracking system (ATS) data, employee engagement survey data.

subcategories.name: Supply Chain & Operations
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686), Splunk Add-on for ServiceNow (Splunkbase 1928), HEC (WMS/TMS/ERP integration).
subcategories.dataSources: ERP order/inventory data via DB Connect (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite), warehouse management system logs (HEC), transport management system events, supplier portal data, IoT sensor data from logistics (temperature, location, GPS).

subcategories.name: Financial Operations & Procurement
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686), Splunk Enterprise Security (Splunkbase 263).
subcategories.dataSources: ERP financial data via DB Connect (GL transactions, AP/AR, expense reports), procurement system events, payment gateway logs, expense management platform data (Concur, Expensify via HEC).

subcategories.name: Customer Support & Service Excellence
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for ServiceNow (Splunkbase 1928), Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686), HEC (helpdesk/CRM integration).
subcategories.dataSources: ServiceNow incident/case records, Zendesk/Freshdesk ticket data via HEC, call centre ACD/IVR logs, customer satisfaction survey responses, chatbot interaction logs.

subcategories.name: Executive Dashboards & Business KPIs
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686), Splunk ITSI (Splunkbase 1841), HEC.
subcategories.dataSources: Aggregated data from all business indexes, KV store with KPI definitions and targets, ERP/CRM/HRIS summary data via DB Connect.

subcategories.name: ESG & Sustainability Reporting
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686), HEC (IoT/BMS integration), Splunk ITSI (Splunkbase 1841).
subcategories.dataSources: Building management system data (power meters, HVAC sensors via BACnet/Modbus), cloud provider sustainability APIs, fleet management telematics, travel booking system data, waste management logs, HR diversity data (anonymised).
